holdings.infoBox: PUI is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Vernova stock at 5.02%, ONEOK at 4.24%, NiSource at 4.18%, Constellation Energy at 3.91%, and Atmos Energy at 3.87%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Utilities Momentum ETF (PUI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. utilities firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PUI was launched on Oct 26, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
